title: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen - Dandy - Jacquard Woven Duvet Cover Set - King Bed Size in Black & Gold
features: Tickle your fancy with this uber glamorous and decadent bedding set from the Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen. Crafted in sleek black and adorned with glittering gold feathers, the design oozes style and charm for a striking luxuriant feel.
A stunning home soft-furnishings collection designed by Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen, featuring his trademark style of elegance and love of a little decadence for a luxurious style.
Fits a standard UK Kingsize duvet quilt size: 230cm Width x 220cm Length (97x87") - Pillowcase size 76cm x 48cm
Fabric: 96% Polyester 4% Metallic (Thread Count - 144) | Care: Wash before use. Wash dark or bright colours separately. Do not bleach. Cool iron on reverse
Complete the look with the LLB Black Tiger Tiger, Dandy or Concierge Cushions and Concierge black velvet bedspread.
description: From the manufacturer Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen A stunning home soft-furnishings collection designed by Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen, featuring his hallmark style of elegance and love of a little decadence for a luxurious style. Glamorous and Decadent Sumptuous Jacquard Weave A Sense of Luxury Metallic Detailing Dandy Luxury Duvet Cover Set by Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen This glamorous and decadent bedding set is crafted in rich navy or deep black and adorned with glittering silver or gold feathers a design that oozes style and charm. The sumptuous jacquard weave adds depth, while the metallic detailing brings a sense of luxury. A stunning home soft-furnishings collection designed by Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen.
